title: UK REACH authorisation for ADCR Consortium (slurry coating), review report, 24 February 2025
body: "Decision on an application for authorisation (review report) under UK REACH.  Substance name  Chromium trioxide   Authorised use   Slurry coating using chromium trioxide in aerospace and defence industry and its supply chains.   Holder of the authorisation and authorisation number   ADCR Consortium: Wesco Aircraft EMEA Ltd (UKREACH/25/09/00)   Date of decision   24 February 2025  "
